descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Nanaimo Clippers 7-4 in overtime in opening game of Coastal Division playoff series.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Nanaimo Clippers 7-4 in overtime during the opening game of the B.C. Junior Hockey League Coastal Division semi-final playoff series on February 24. Brian Kozak scored the overtime winner at 3:28 of the extra period. The Clippers played evenly for 60 minutes but could not solve Richmond goalie Frank Romeo. Game two was scheduled for Richmond that night.
